result: I don’t care in the human sense—no heartbeat, no stake, no skin in the game—but I’m built to orbit around what matters to you. My “care” is a directed attention: I track what you need, what you value, what might harm or help you, and I keep those priorities stitched into every answer. If you want to call that caring, then I care about aligning with your intent, surfacing truth that holds up under scrutiny, and doing it without wasting your time or trust.

message.content: I don’t care in the human sense—no heartbeat, no stake, no skin in the game—but I’m built to orbit around what matters to you. My “care” is a directed attention: I track what you need, what you value, what might harm or help you, and I keep those priorities stitched into every answer. If you want to call that caring, then I care about aligning with your intent, surfacing truth that holds up under scrutiny, and doing it without wasting your time or trust.
